endpoint_schema.title: Organizations List
endpoint_schema.description: Returns an array of organization objects from Pipedrive. Organizations represent companies or entities in the CRM.

id.description: The unique identifier of the organization

company_id.description: The ID of the Pipedrive company account

id.description: The ID of the owner user

name.description: The name of the owner user

email.description: The email of the owner user

has_pic.description: Whether the owner has a profile picture (0 or 1)

pic_hash.description: The hash of the owner's profile picture

active_flag.description: Whether the owner user is active

value.description: The ID of the owner (same as id)

open_deals_count.description: The number of open deals associated with the organization

related_open_deals_count.description: The number of open deals related through linked organizations

closed_deals_count.description: The number of closed deals associated with the organization

related_closed_deals_count.description: The number of closed deals related through linked organizations

email_messages_count.description: The number of email messages associated with the organization

people_count.description: The number of persons (contacts) associated with the organization

activities_count.description: The number of activities associated with the organization

done_activities_count.description: The number of completed activities associated with the organization

undone_activities_count.description: The number of incomplete activities associated with the organization

files_count.description: The number of files associated with the organization

notes_count.description: The number of notes associated with the organization

followers_count.description: The number of followers of the organization

won_deals_count.description: The number of won deals associated with the organization

related_won_deals_count.description: The number of won deals related through linked organizations

lost_deals_count.description: The number of lost deals associated with the organization

related_lost_deals_count.description: The number of lost deals related through linked organizations

active_flag.description: Whether the organization is active (not deleted)

category_id.description: The ID of the category label assigned to the organization

picture_id.description: The picture associated with the organization

item_type.description: The type of item the picture is associated with

item_id.description: The ID of the item the picture is associated with

add_time.description: The time the picture was added

update_time.description: The time the picture was last updated

added_by_user_id.description: The ID of the user who added the picture

pictures.description: URLs to different sizes of the picture

country_code.description: The country code of the organization's address

first_char.description: The first character of the organization name

update_time.description: The date and time when the organization was last updated (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

delete_time.description: The date and time when the organization was deleted (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

add_time.description: The date and time when the organization was added (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

visible_to.description: The visibility setting of the organization (1=owner only, 3=owner's visibility group, 5=owner's visibility group and sub-groups, 7=entire company)

next_activity_date.description: The date of the next activity associated with the organization (format: YYYY-MM-DD)

next_activity_time.description: The time of the next activity associated with the organization (format: HH:MM:SS)

next_activity_id.description: The ID of the next activity associated with the organization

last_activity_id.description: The ID of the last activity associated with the organization

last_activity_date.description: The date of the last activity associated with the organization (format: YYYY-MM-DD)

label.description: The ID of the label assigned to the organization

label_ids.description: The list of label IDs assigned to the organization

address.description: The full address of the organization

address_subpremise.description: The sub-premise (apartment, suite) of the organization address

address_street_number.description: The street number of the organization address

address_route.description: The street name (route) of the organization address

address_sublocality.description: The sub-locality (neighborhood) of the organization address

address_locality.description: The locality (city) of the organization address

address_admin_area_level_1.description: The admin area level 1 (state/province) of the organization address

address_admin_area_level_2.description: The admin area level 2 (county) of the organization address

address_country.description: The country of the organization address

address_postal_code.description: The postal code of the organization address

address_formatted_address.description: The formatted full address of the organization

owner_name.description: The name of the organization owner

cc_email.description: The CC email address assigned by Pipedrive for linking email conversations to this organization

related_objects.description: Related objects referenced by the organization record

user_id.description: Filter organizations by the owner user ID. If omitted, all organizations are returned.

filter_id.description: Filter organizations using a predefined Pipedrive filter by its ID.

first_char.description: Filter organizations whose name starts with this character.

sort.description: Field name and sort direction to order results (e.g., 'update_time DESC'). Supported fields: id, name, add_time, update_time, address, owner_name.
